errors.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.submitted: If that email matches an account, a reset link is on the way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in.

errors.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.tokenUsed: This reset link has already been used.
errors.passwordBreached: This password appears in a known data breach. Choose a different one.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Change your account password. Your current device stays signed in; every other active session is signed out.
changePassword.success: Password updated. Other sessions have been signed out.

errors.samePassword: Pick a different password — the new one cannot equal the current one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

errors.tokenExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask an administrator to send a new one.
errors.tokenUsed: This invitation has already been used.

idleWarning.title: Still there?
idleWarning.description: You'll be signed out in {seconds} seconds.

denied.readOnly: Your role does not permit this action.
denied.portalMismatch: This account can't sign in here.

memberPortal.title: Member portal
memberPortal.intro: You're signed in to the SweCham member portal. The full experience is being rolled out phase by phase.
memberPortal.roadmapDescription: Your upcoming member experience by phase.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: View and update your membership details (coming in F3).

invoices.title: Invoices & receipts
invoices.description: Tax-compliant Thai invoices and payment history (F4).

events.title: Events & registration
events.description: Browse chamber events and register online (F6).

renewal.title: Online renewal
renewal.description: Renew your membership and pay with card (F5).

memberPortal.contactDescription: Until self-service lands, email us and we'll help directly.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to see this.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to see this.
errors.readOnlyMode: The system is currently in read-only mode for maintenance.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: {total} accounts total
users.listDescription: Invite, disable, enable, or change roles. Destructive actions require confirmation.
users.empty: No users yet. Invite the first one to get started.

disable.title: Disable this account?
disable.description: {email} will lose access immediately and all their active sessions will be signed out. You can re-enable the account later.

enable.title: Re-enable this account?
enable.description: {email} will regain access and can sign in again.
